headlines.description: Everton's Dominic Calvert-Lewin scored his 50th Premier League goal to give his side a 1-0 away win at West Ham United on Sunday
headlines.shortLinkText: Calvert-Lewin earns Everton win at West Ham

headlines.description: Aston Villa chalked up their 12th successive Premier League win at home with a comfortable 3-1 victory over struggling Luton Town as they maintained their top-four challenge on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Villa beat Luton to extend home winning streak

headlines.description: Brighton's search for a return to winning ways in the Premier League continues after they were held to a 1-1 draw by Fulham at the Amex on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brighton held to 1-1 draw at home against Fulham

headlines.description: Goals from Diogo Jota, Darwin Núñez and Mohamed Salah gave Liverpool a comfortable 3-0 win over Nottingham Forest at Anfield on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Salah, Núñez net as Liverpool cruise to easy win

headlines.description: Manchester City's Erling Haaland struck twice at Old Trafford as they dominated Manchester United in a 3-0 thrashing in Sunday's derby.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haaland stars as Man City thump United in derby
